name: Moo Sate
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the beef into thin strips, no more than 1/4 inch thick and about 1 inch wide.
2. Aim to make the strips as paper-thin as possible.
3. In a large bowl, mix curry powder, ground chilies, minced garlic, onions, salt, lemon juice, and honey.
4. Add the beef strips to the marinade and toss well to ensure they are evenly coated.
5. Thread 3-4 meat strips onto bamboo skewers, ensuring that onion and garlic pieces adhere to the meat.
6. Arrange the skewered meat in a dish, cover with any remaining marinade, and refrigerate while preparing the sauce.
7. Brown or grill the meat skewers and serve immediately with the warmed peanut butter sauce for dipping.
Sauce Instructions:
1. In a blender, combine all sauce ingredients.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Store the sauce in the refrigerator but bring it to room temperature before serving.
